seoTitle: Henty vs Herne Hill — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Henty and Herne Hill. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Henty vs Herne Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Henty and Herne Hill.
heading: Henty vs Herne Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Henty, Western Australia and Herne Hill, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Herne Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Henty (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Henty or Herne Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Henty has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Herne Hill scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Henty scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Herne Hill scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Henty or Herne Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Herne Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
